title: Aurora Advances Global Medical Cannabis Portfolio with New Product Launches
text: Aurora Cannabis Inc. announced significant expansion of medical cannabis portfolio across Canada, Europe, and Australia as of April 28, 2026. Key market launches in Germany: Two new dried flower products including Pink OG Kush (25-27% THC) and Lemon Sorbet (21% THC). Poland: Expanded potency offerings with Electric Honeydew (27% THC) and Chemango Kush (29% THC). Australia: Introduction of pastille formats - discrete, precisely-dosed edibles including Black Raspberry and Blood Orange varieties with varying cannabinoid profiles. Canada: Four new products spanning dried flower and pre-roll formats under WMMC and San Raf brands, with THC ranges from 22-31%. Strategic focus: VP Innovation Lana Culley stated: Our focus remains on delivering consistency and reliability across markets we serve while expanding product variety to meet patient and prescriber demand. Launches leverage Aurora's GMP-certified manufacturing network across Canada and Germany, emphasizing quality control and sustainable international growth in regulated medical markets. Rollout demonstrates company's commitment to medical-first strategy and expansion of product variety to meet evolving patient and prescriber needs across key regulated international markets.
